name: PeaSHOOTer
description:
Your peashooter whipped out a Glock after you planted it. Seems like he switched sides today.

Remember when I said I was making individuals? Yeah, here’s the first PvZ individual. A surprise is coming after or on the 31st.

Twisted focused bot and this will probably be released on the same day.

Have fun. A Sunflower bot coming. DO NOT THE PEASHOOTER. It’s on limitless because he’s gonna shoot you.
creator: SlushDaSlime
